args.code: (()=>{const rows=[...document.querySelectorAll('tr,.ant-table-row,li,div')].map(n=>({text:(n.innerText||n.textContent||'').replace(/s+/g,' ').trim(),node:n})).filter(x=>x.text.includes('24 Inch Longer Faucet Mat')); const out=rows.slice(0,5).map(x=>({text:x.text.slice(0,700),links:[...x.node.querySelectorAll('a')].map(a=>({text:(a.innerText||a.textContent||'').trim(),href:a.href})).filter(l=>l.href||l.text)})); return JSON.stringify(out);})()
